# CarbyneTech

> CarbyneTech delivers AI, SAP, and digital manufacturing solutions that turn data into decisions across the supply chain and shop floor.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of CarbyneTech's AI, SAP, and manufacturing intelligence services.
- [Culture](/culture): Life and values at CarbyneTech.
- [Careers](/careers): Open roles and how to join the team.
- [Insights & Events](/insights-events): Case studies, articles, and upcoming events.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the CarbyneTech team.
- [Book a Consultant](/book-consultant): Schedule a discovery call.

## Solutions

- [Agentic Intelligence](/agentic-intelligence): Autonomous AI agents for enterprise workflows.
- [Decision Intelligence](/decision-intelligence): Data-driven decision systems combining analytics, AI, and human judgment.
- [Predictive Analytics](/predictive-analytics): Production-grade machine learning for forecasting.
- [Vision Analytics](/vision-analytics): Computer vision for quality, safety, and process intelligence.
- [Condition Monitoring](/condition-monitoring): Real-time equipment health monitoring.
- [Enterprise Data Engineering](/enterprise-data-engineering): Modern data platforms, pipelines, and governance.
- [Intelligent Web & Mobile Apps](/intelligent-web-mobile-apps): Custom apps enhanced with AI.
- [Microsoft Power Platform](/microsoft-power-platform): Power Apps, Automate, and BI solutions.
- [Splunk AI Applications](/splunk-ai-applications): AI-driven observability and operations on Splunk.

## Manufacturing & Shop Floor

- [SFx9 MES](/sfx9-mes): Manufacturing Execution System for connected shop floors.
- [Factory Finite Scheduling](/factory-finite-scheduling): Constraint-aware production scheduling.
- [Shop Floor](/shopfloor): Digital shop floor visibility, quality, and OEE.
- [Shop Floor Digital Apps](/shopfloor-digital-apps): Operator-facing apps connecting people, machines, and SAP.
- [Tech Factory](/tech-factory): CarbyneTech Tech Factory engineering delivery.
- [InventIQ](/inventiq): AI-driven inventory intelligence.

## SAP

- [SAP RISE Implementation](/sap-rise-implementation): RISE with SAP and S/4HANA Cloud transformation.
- [SAP IBP](/sap-ibp): Integrated Business Planning for demand, supply, and S&OP.
- [SAP EWM](/sap-ewm): Extended Warehouse Management.
- [SAP Supply Chain & Finance](/sap-supply-chain-finance): Integrated SAP supply chain and finance solutions.
- [SAP Analytics & Power BI](/sap-analytics-power-bi): SAP analytics, BW/4HANA, and Power BI dashboards.
- [SAP Application Support](/sap-application-support): End-to-end SAP application management.
- [SAP Value Creation](/sap-value-creation): Unlocking measurable value from SAP investments.
